steps.title: Identify the rate of change from the linear equation
steps.content: The equation $d = 7t + 185$ is linear, where the coefficient of $t$ represents the rate of change. Here, the rate is 7 feet per minute.

steps.title: Calculate the distance increase over 30 minutes
steps.content: Over a 30-minute period, the total increase in distance is: $$\Delta d = 7 \times 30 = 210 \text{ feet}$$ C is correct.
